name: Eye Health & Macular Degeneration
description: Common age-related macular degeneration (AMD) susceptibility markers. Best read as predisposition, not diagnosis.

snps.description: Complement-factor H variant strongly associated with common AMD risk in European-ancestry studies.

TT.note: No common CFH Y402H risk allele detected at this site.

CT.note: One common AMD risk allele is present at CFH. Lifestyle and retinal screening matter more as age advances.

CC.note: Two common CFH risk alleles are present. This is a stronger inherited AMD predisposition signal.

snps.description: One of the best-replicated common AMD variants; smoking amplifies the risk signal.

GG.note: No common ARMS2 risk allele detected at this site.

GT.note: One common AMD risk allele is present at ARMS2.

TT.note: Two ARMS2 risk alleles are present. This is a strong common susceptibility signal for AMD.

snps.description: Complement C3 variant associated with advanced AMD risk in multiple cohorts.

CC.note: No common C3 AMD risk allele detected at this site.

CG.note: One C3 risk allele is present. This modestly raises common AMD susceptibility.

GG.note: Two C3 risk alleles are present. This is a stronger complement-pathway AMD signal.
